title: InstanceAuditLogItem
content:
# InstanceAuditLogItem


## Properties

- **action** (`string`): Type of action performed over the platform resource.
- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Audit Log was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **id** (`integer`): Unique ID of the Audit Log entry.
- **identifier** (`string`): The platform resource that generated the audit log.
- **meta** (`object`): Contextual information about the action. For example, updating a resource you probably see information about the previous state (FROM key) and the current state (TO key) of the resource.
- **namespace** (`string`): In which service the audit log was created.
- **request_id** (`string`): Deprecated. Not being used.
- **user_id** (`string`): User ID that initiated the action.
- **username** (`string`): Username used to create the action.
summary: Object with properties: action, created, id, identifier, meta

action.description: Type of action performed over the platform resource.

created.description: UTC time when the Audit Log was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.

identifier.description: The platform resource that generated the audit log.

meta.description: Contextual information about the action. For example, updating a resource you probably see information about the previous state (FROM key) and the current state (TO key) of the resource.

namespace.description: In which service the audit log was created.

user_id.description: User ID that initiated the action.

username.description: Username used to create the action.
